ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the country was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural dimension record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dimension scores belong to */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set from which the dimension scores were collected */,
  "responsibility" REAL /* Score for responsibility */,
  "unselfishness" REAL /* Score for unselfishness */,
  "faith" REAL /* Score for faith */,
  "saving" REAL /* Score for saving */,
  "determination" REAL /* Score for determination */,
  "imagination" REAL /* Score for imagination */,
  "hard_work" REAL /* Score for hard work */,
  "independence" REAL /* Score for independence */,
  "self_expression" REAL /* Score for self-expression */,
  "respect" REAL /* Score for respect */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dimension scores were added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dimension scores were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_dimensions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_dimensions_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which the data was collected */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data set */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data set in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data set file */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression type of the data set file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data set was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data set was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data set information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data set */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data set was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cultural cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cultural cluster */,
  "countries" TEXT /* List of countries that belong to the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_set_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_set_versions_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_set_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_set_comments_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_set_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
